title: The Wind Phone
subTitle: Originating in Japan, the phenomenon of wind phones has now spread worldwide. These special phones, which aren't connected to a telephone line, have the power to connect people with lost loved ones.

title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo Mini
subTitle: A collection of recipes that celebrate ingredients sourced from across Japan and sold at Tokyo's fresh food markets.

title: NHK World Japan
subTitle: Edo was a city of waterways. The Yoroi Ferry transported people across the Nihonbashi River, one of its main commercial arteries. For the captain, it was a high-pressure job requiring skill and guts.

title: Today's Close-Up
subTitle: Digging deeper into current affairs with cutting-edge information and critical analysis on important issues confronting Japanese lives.

title: Document 72 Hours
subTitle: From beginners to pros, this gym in Tokyo welcomes people of all ages and skill levels. Each member has a unique reason for training here. We find out what they're wrestling with in their lives.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Science View
subTitle: Part plant and part animal, microscopic euglena algae have been used as foods and bio-fuels. Now they are helping produce an adhesive that could be used in car manufacturing.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Journeys in Japan
subTitle: DJ George Cockle travels to Gifu prefecture to explore Ogaki, known as the city of water. He also tries various local specialities and learns about the wisdom of locals.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Dining with the Chef
subTitle: With recipes for egg and shrimp Soboro Donburi, tofu and ground meat donburi.

subTitle: Japanese yams are a traditional ingredient loved for their sticky texture. Experience a harvest using heavy machinery to dig deep underground, then savor dishes including tororo over rice.

title: Dive in Tokyo
subTitle: Okachimachi is an area just north of Akihabara renowned for its jewelry district. Its story involves Buddhist craftspeople, American servicemen, and more recently, communities of foreign artisans.

subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Kabuki Kool
subTitle: The historic figure of Minamoto no Yoshitsune has been immortalised in many kabuki plays as a child, a skilled warrior, and a tragic hero. Explore with actor Kataoka Ainosuke.

subTitle: Every round of sumo wrestling requires a sacred ritual to expel the evil spirits, including drinking water to cleanse and purify their bodies.

title: Direct Talk
subTitle: Ito Junji is a horror manga artist renowned worldwide for his intricate artwork and unique vision, which earned him a place in the prestigious Eisner Awards Hall of Fame in 2025. What inspires him?

subTitle: Nikki Tsukamoto Kininmonth learns about heat-resistant labels and meets Takehisa Kenji, the CEO of a company that manufactures these labels.
